query:
INSERT INTO clients (lead_id, source, name, email, phone, company, tags, is_converted, total_bookings, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (NULL, 'tpv', 'Carlos Calin', 'jorgemgrande@gmail.com', '+34693026894', '', '[]', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  name = IF(TRIM(name) = '' OR name IS NULL, 'Carlos Calin', name),
  phone = IF(TRIM(phone) = '' OR phone IS NULL, '+34693026894', phone),
  total_bookings = total_bookings + 1,
  updated_at = NOW();
